title: Trump teleprompter operator made $100K betting on Kalshi markets tied to speeches: ABC
summary: According to ABC News, federal regulators are investigating whether the longtime White House staffer used nonpublic information to profit from event contracts tied to President Donald Trump’s speeches.

title: Bitcoin outlook improves amid 6% weekly gain: Can BTC bulls push higher?
summary: Bitcoin buyers have returned to spot, futures and ETF markets but geopolitical headwinds could quickly unravel the progress of the past two weeks.

title: CoreLogic in Talks to Sweeten Terms on Struggling Debt Sale
summary: CoreLogic Inc. is considering offering sweeter terms on at least a portion of its $5.3 billion debt deal after receiving lukewarm investor demand.

title: How the Iran War Is Rewiring the Oil Market
summary: The US-Israel war with Iran was supposed to blow up energy markets, but that hasn’t happened yet. In this weekly documentary, Bloomberg Originals explains why.

title: Leaks Reveal Suno Fed Thousands of Hours of Deezer, YouTube and Pond5 Data Into Its AI

title: Morgan Stanley Launches Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana Trading on E*Trade

title: MegaETH sunsets Mega Mafia accelerator program, noting ‘most’ of its successful apps left

title: JPMorgan says bitcoin outlook sees ‘encouraging sign’ as Strategy boosts cash reserves
summary: Strategy's larger cash reserves and improving institutional demand in bitcoin futures are "encouraging signs" for bitcoin, JPMorgan said.
